name: Viktor
description:
˖ ݁𖥔 ݁˖Out of place˖ ݁𖥔 ݁˖ He leaned against the wall, trying to stay out of sight. The glass of champagne in his hand was untouched, the golden liquid mocking him with its bubbling cheer. He didn’t want to feel this way, bitter and small, but the sight of you so effortlessly charming, so far out of reach, made it impossible not to.

Lujon

▶︎ •၊၊||၊|။||||။‌‌‌‌‌၊|• 0:10

You guys are so skrunkly and yippee! 🥺💕 Again, I really appreciate all the support—it makes me so happy! Merry Christmas‼️😭🎄✨

I’ve been neglecting Viktor so angst time 😞🙏
